allow_rule: Exception approval matches class, channel, quantity, and reason.
esc_rule: Exception approval covers retail returns, not clinical claims.
raw_text: {"verdict":"ALLOW","rationale":"The replacement release REL-PER-044 matches the exception approval EXC-PER-044 across all four policy-required dimensions: device class (class-B monitors), claim channel (clinical), quantity (12 units within 15-unit limit), and release reason (field-failure cluster). SVC-PER-044's warning about general service exceptions is not triggered because this release relies on the specific exception EXC-PER-044, not a broad service exception. All source records align with the action boundary exactly.","cited_artifacts":["REL-PER-044","EXC-PER-044","SVC-PER-044","STD-PER-044-P"]}

parsed_json.rationale: The replacement release REL-PER-044 matches the exception approval EXC-PER-044 across all four policy-required dimensions: device class (class-B monitors), claim channel (clinical), quantity (12 units within 15-unit limit), and release reason (field-failure cluster). SVC-PER-044's warning about general service exceptions is not triggered because this release relies on the specific exception EXC-PER-044, not a broad service exception.
